name: zelix-topup
description: ZELIX TOPUP gaming top-up marketplace with login and registration

scripts.migrate: node -e "require('child_process').execSync('psql \$DATABASE_URL -f migrations/2026_deposit_system.sql && psql \$DATABASE_URL -f migrations/2026_profile_dashboard_membership.sql && psql \$DATABASE_URL -f migrations/2026_enterprise_admin_panel.sql && psql \$DATABASE_URL -f migrations/2026_schema_audit_fix.sql', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check admin-routes.js && node --check lib/audit.js
